2141620.name: Landiscape
2141620.description:
Landiscape is aimed to be a fun and relaxed open world sandbox survival game to enjoy with up to 4 friends. Live your life as a safe farmer and grow your crops, or live your life as a raider where you scavenge the fallen world and wage war against all your enemies.

Squad up with your friends and hope that you can trust them, friendly fire is on. Landiscape has mobs ranging from classic zombies, large dino-like creatures, fast sprinting spiders, and even simple deer. 

Runners charge without warning. Crawlers lurk in the shadows. Brutes crush through anything in their path. And it’s not just the infected—other survivors will do worse.

Landiscape drops you into a hostile open world where every sound, shadow, and choice could be your last:

  • Scavenge & craft: Turn junk and salvage into weapons, gear, and life-saving tools.

  • Build anywhere: Reinforce a gas station, wall off a grocery store, or make a forest bunker.

  • Survive the undead: Face a dynamic AI horde that stalks, flanks, and evolves.

  • Hunt or be hunted: Fight for territory, supplies, and your next breath.

Gather. Fortify. Outlast.
Nightfall brings no safety. In Landiscape, everything wants you dead.
2141620.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
